topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

questions.hindi: मैं कल चावल खाऊँगा।
questions.english: I will eat rice tomorrow.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + will + V1 | will + be + V1+ing | will have + V3 | will have + been + V1+ing
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will eat rice tomorrow."
questions.grammarRule: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
questions.category: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) practice

questions.category: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) practice
